roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Motion to Modify Court Probation
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DA MOT TO AMEND COMP FILED

/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 30D/CTS:0/ X: REMAINING CJ TIME THROUGH SWAP/SWAPD:03-29-18/CTORD:SWAP TIME MAY BE SERVED IN ALAMEDA COUNTY/PF460 12/VF2:150/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1Y/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CITE/BKFEE/X:RESTITUTION FROM COUNTS 1 AND 3 HARVEYWAIVED TO COUNT 2/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATIONOF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:(DATE)/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:APD/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFEERENCE & MOTION TO AMEND/DAWT/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TOAMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE FILED THE FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT/AMENDCOM:ADDING ALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE SECTION 23578 AND 23538(B)(2) AND 23577(A)/X:THE DEFENSE REQUEST SCRAMTO BE REMOVED/X:DEFENSE FILED ORDER TO REMOVE SCRAM/ /CTORD:SCRAM TO BE REMOVED AND THE DEFENDANT WAS ORDERED NOT TO DRIVE WITH ANY MEASUARABLE AMOUNT OF ALCOHOL IN HIS SYSTEM/ /CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPC/

/CAL:TRIAL AND DA MOTION TO AMEND/INTC/X:JONAH CHEW, APPEARED SPECIALLY,//X:PD'S OFFICE IS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD,/GTWM/VD:TRIAL AND LAST DAY OF 12-15-17/CONTD:PRETRIAL AND MOTION TO AMEND/DAWF/

/CAL:I&A, P&C AND REQUEST FOR SCRAM/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/987,2/NTW/LDTR:12-26-17/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THERIGHT TO DEMUR,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO DO SCRAM AND SHOW PROOF/CONTD:PROOF OFSCRAM/DOPU:PROOF IS SUBMITTED/CONTD:TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION/DAWT/MO GRTD/PROB MOD/CPROB/PROB EXP:03-28-21/
